name: btx-clinical-research
description: BTX Clinical Research website — an English-only Astro + Tailwind + Vercel single-page site.

scripts.postbuild: node -e "try{const f=require('fs'),p='.vercel/output/functions/_render.func/.vc-config.json';if(f.existsSync(p)){const c=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));c.runtime='nodejs20.x';f.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));console.log('[postbuild] Patched function runtime to nodejs20.x')}}catch(e){console.error('[postbuild] patch failed:',e.message)}"
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
